rules: Contract fixtures prove evaluator behavior only and MUST use classification contract-fixture.
Production acceptance requires a reviewed production-domain dataset, exact one-to-one query runs, a pinned Provider version and adapter commit, and an immutable release workflow reference.
Dataset, raw results, and evaluation report files MUST exist under the Provider certification artifact root and MUST match their recorded SHA-256 digests.
Draft templates, sample results, duplicate or unknown query runs, stale evidence, and failed threshold reports MUST NOT satisfy production evidence.
